nasb.text: The border turned to Ramah and to the fortified city of Tyre; then the border turned to Hosah, and it ended at the sea by the region of Achzib.

esv.text: Then the boundary turns to Ramah, reaching to the fortified city of Tyre. Then the boundary turns to Hosah, and it ends at the sea; Mahalab, Achzib,

cnv.text: 又轉到拉瑪，直到設防的城推羅；再轉到何薩，直通到海岸靠近亞革悉的地區；

ccb.text: 再转到拉玛、坚固的泰尔城，然后转到何萨和亚革悉一带，直到地中海。
